Juliana Guevara Java — A single origin coffee offering a distinct and unique flavor profile from a specific producer.
Gitwe — A single origin coffee with unique characteristics specific to its region and processing.
Irvin Izaguirre — A single origin coffee showcasing the specific terroir and craftsmanship of its origin.
Nelson Moreno — A single origin coffee highlighting the unique qualities of beans from a particular farm or region.
Bolt — A signature coffee blend crafted for a consistent and balanced flavor experience.
Blends Subscription — Receive a curated selection of Madcap's coffee blends delivered regularly to your door.
Eureka — A popular coffee blend known for its distinctive and enjoyable taste profile.
Single Origin Subscription — Experience a rotating selection of unique single origin coffees with regular deliveries.
MiiR New Standard Carafe — A stylish and functional carafe designed for serving and keeping coffee warm.
Kalita Wave 155 — A popular pour-over coffee dripper known for its flat-bottom design and consistent extraction.
Kalita Wave 185 Glass Dripper — A glass version of the Kalita Wave dripper, offering excellent heat retention and visual appeal.
Aeropress Coffee Maker — A versatile and portable coffee maker capable of brewing various coffee styles, from espresso-like to full immersion.
Breville Bambino Plus — A compact and user-friendly espresso machine for home baristas seeking quality espresso.
Breville Barista Touch Impress — An advanced espresso machine with intuitive touchscreen control and integrated grinding for a seamless experience.
Breville Barista Express — A popular all-in-one espresso machine with an integrated grinder, allowing for fresh beans to espresso in under a minute.
Breville Barista Touch — An intuitive espresso machine with a touchscreen display, guiding users through the brewing and frothing process.
Stacked Logo Hoodie — A comfortable hoodie featuring the Madcap Coffee stacked logo.
Stacked Logo Longsleeve Tee — A long-sleeve t-shirt adorned with the Madcap Coffee stacked logo.
1041 Fulton Dickies Work Shirt — A durable work shirt featuring branding related to Madcap's Fulton Street location.
Stacked Logo Tee — A classic short-sleeve t-shirt with the Madcap Coffee stacked logo.
Circle Logo Tee — A short-sleeve t-shirt featuring the Madcap Coffee circle logo.
Bolt Circle Tee — A short-sleeve t-shirt with a design inspired by the 'Bolt' coffee blend.
Madcap Socks — Branded socks for coffee lovers.
Always-On Crew — A branded crewneck sweatshirt designed for everyday comfort.
E Gift Cards — Digital gift cards perfect for giving the gift of Madcap Coffee.
Placebo (Decaf) — A decaffeinated coffee blend offering rich flavor without the caffeine.
Fraction (Half-Caff) — A half-caffeinated coffee blend, ideal for those seeking a milder caffeine experience.
Cascara — Dried coffee cherry skins, often used for brewing a tea-like beverage.
Day Dream — A coffee blend designed for a smooth and enjoyable daily brew.
secondary: STAY CONNECTED — FOR THOUGHTFUL UPDATES, NEW RELEASES, AND A CLOSER LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE BUILDING.

matches.primary: Madcap Coffee exists to reveal the craftsmanship and human connection behind every cup, transforming a daily ritual into something more intentional. Based in Michigan, we roast and serve specialty coffee in Grand Rapids and Detroit while partnering with cafes, restaurants, and markets through our wholesale program.

Based in Michigan, we roast and serve specialty coffee in Grand Rapids and Detroit while partnering with cafes, restaurants, and markets through our wholesale program.
